feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud TRM-Special G/L indicator not defined or incorrect
entry.content:
Hello Community, 

I tried to reverse a loan in TRM, using the "Process Business Transactions" app, but I received the following error:

I've seen that in SAP On-Premise, the Special G/L flag can be deactivated using transaction /nob41 to revert the document, but in SAP Public Cloud, changes to the Posting Key cannot be made, as they are set by default.

Has anyone else encountered this problem?

I hope to receive some advice from you.

Thank you very much,

Dmytro.

entry.title: BADI to implement delivery split based on Stock Transport Order Line Item when run VL10B
entry.content:
BADI to implement delivery split based on Stock Transport Order Line Item when run VL10B.

When we create a Stock Transport Order with two or more item and we create the outbound delivery through VL10B or Schedule Delivery Creation App (job) system creates one delivery, we want to know if there is a method to add split logic based on previous document.

entry.title: Port to port (PP) or Port to Door (PD) for sales sea freight booking (SFB) scenarios.
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts,
I am working with SAP Transportation Management (TM) in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and have a question regarding the automatic determination of movement types for Sea Freight Bookings (SFB).
Currently, when creating an SFB from a Sales Order via the Freight Unit (FU), the system automatically determines movement types such as Door to Port (DP) or Door to Door (DD). This behavior seems driven by the Incoterms, IncLoc1 ID, IncLoc2 ID, and shipping point fields in the Sales Order.

I am trying to achieve the following:
Is it possible to have the system automatically create the SFB with Movement Type Port to Port (PP) or Port to Door (PD)?
Observation on Manual Creation: If I create the SFB manually, select the PP or PD movement type, and then manually assign the Freight Unit, the system automatically determines the Loading Port as the Shipping Point. Is this the standard expected behavior? Field Determination: Is there a specific field I might be missing in the Sales Order that would explicitly trigger a "Port" as the starting location instead of the Shipping Point?

 

 


Current Workaround:
A viable solution I have found is to create the SFB manually, select PP or PD, add the FU, and then manually insert an intermediate stage to correctly define the Loading Port. However, the goal is to have the Loading Port correctly identified during SFB creation without adding extra stages.
Is this workaround the only valid solution in the Public Edition, or is there a way to influence the initial stage building and movement type determination directly from the predecessor document?

 

Thank you for your insights!

entry.title: Set 'Calculation of Value for Purchase Account' for Plant 6310 / Co Code 6310 Delivery Cost and Rece
entry.content: Set 'Calculation of Value for Purchase Account' for Plant 6310 / Co Code 6310 Delivery Cost and Receipt Value.

entry.title: How to Segragate Payment terms for two different Companies
entry.content: WE have two company 1100 and 1200 for which we have created Payment terms separately but during transaction we are not able to hide the payment terms, system is displaying payment terms in common for both companies, how can we segragate them based on  compnay code.

entry.title: Scheduling of background jobs in production system - Access related query
entry.content:
Hi,

I have a question regarding access-related concerns in the production system.

We have developed a few background jobs in the SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud and successfully tested them. These jobs have now been transported to the production system. Currently, the background jobs are scheduled in production by our functional team.

However, since the production system is meant for business use, our access will be revoked once the project is completed, as we are not part of the customer’s organization. In this context, I would like some clarification on the following points:

  1. After our access is revoked, will the already scheduled background jobs be cancelled automatically? If so, will the business users need to reschedule them?

  2. If the background job continues to run and creates subsequent documents after our access is revoked, will those documents remain valid, or will they be discarded?

If there is a risk in the current approach, could you please advise on how this can be handled correctly? Specifically, what is the recommended best practice for scheduling and managing background jobs in the production system?

entry.title: Schedule overhead accounting jobs - select current period dynamically
entry.content:
Hi all,

In SAP S4Hana Cloud Public we want to schedule a monthly recurring job using the template Actual Settlement: Projects (SAP). We know how to set the recurrence pattern but unsure if there's a way we can get the job to automatically use the current periods/fiscal years? Are there variables we can enter in the parameter fields that will pick up the current period/fiscal year values?

Thanks

entry.title: A method for deploying made-to-order (MTO) items within the MRP area.
entry.content:
Make-to-order policy: Is it impossible to generate requirements for 20 items within the MRP area?

Do you know of any way to generate requirements for at least the component items within the MRP area, even if not the finished products?

We have confirmed that the manufacturing storage location for the order BOM has been set, and that storage locations within the MRP area have been assigned to the storage locations for the planned orders of finished products.

entry.title: User with catalog Tax Declaration and Submit JE for Verification can post journal entries
entry.content:
Catalog General Ledger - Journal Entry Processing (SAP_FIN_BC_GL_JE_PROC_PC) is a dependent catalog to Access Manage Journal Entries - New Version (F0717A_TRAN) from catalog General Ledger - Tax Declaration (SAP_FIN_BC_GL_TX_DCL_PC). Users with roles containing both General Ledger - Tax Declaration (SAP_FIN_BC_GL_TX_DCL_PC) and General Ledger - Submit Journal Entries for Verification (SAP_FIN_BC_GL_PARKDCPRE_PC) are allowed to bypass workflows and post journal entries directly. How to eliminate this?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: DRC Reporting: Withholding Tax
entry.content: We are testing the DRC reporting compliance set of reports and we are having a challenge on the Withholding tax reports for Spain, Mexico, and Germany.

entry.title: Extract report on GL line item with its total GL account amount
entry.content:
Hi SAP experts,

We have a concern regarding how reports can be extracted from the Display Line Items in General Ledger app. Currently, we are required to manually expand each G/L account group, and when the report is downloaded, it only shows individual line items without retaining the G/L account grouping.

May we check if there is an alternative way to expand all line items at once without having to manually click the arrow for each G/L account?

In SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud, how can we achieve to extract report for each GL account group and its each line items entry?

Appreciate your feedback.

Thank you.

Regards,

Liyana

entry.title: WBS Restriction in search help App Create Supplier Invoice, Post general journal entries
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

currently in my server sap public cloud, have a plan to add another Company Code. 

i have condition that WBS related for the specific company only shown to the user that have access to their WBS Company.

in the apps Create Supplier Invoice and Post general journal entries doesnt have a rescrtion type likes in the enterprises project (S4PPM_PR1)

when we use search help to find the WBS, user can see all the WBS for their company and also another wbs from another company. it can still show another WBS from another company if we deleted the parameter when use the search help.

is there a solution to restrict the wbs view to only their company  when the parameter deleted or not deleted ?

Thankyou

entry.title: Background Job For Processing of Invoices
entry.content:
Is it possible to schedule the background processing (release) of "To Be Posted" billing documents in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud using dedicated Fiori apps? Can it be set up in such a way that a report is generated once the job is complete?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Addition of Column in Standard Report Display Purchasing Documents by Material (ME2M)
entry.content:
Hello Team,

We want to add one column in APP - Display Purchasing Documents by Material ME2M of (Basic Price) with out freight Charges.

I don't see any documentation or Note on this.

We are using S4 Hana Public Cloud.

entry.title: Real Estate Cost Settlement
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We would like to use the Real Estate Cost Settlement to settle costs to our tenants. In a starter public cloud system we activated the scope item 6N8. When trying to create service groups, we noticed that it is a must to have a building / land object to assign to the service group. We cannot create these objects in our system, but we are able to create usable- and rentable objects.

Does this mean that we can only use this Real Estate Cost Settlement if we have integration with a master data system like Planon? We are not planning to use such a master data system, but we would like to create a cost settlement.

Thanks in advance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: New Question Subject Enter a subject Where do you want to post this question? Financial Management
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I hope you are doing well.

I am currently a student using the SAP Learning Hub and I am very interested in building my career in SAP Financial Accounting.

In my professional background, I worked as an Accounts Payable end user, and now my goal is to become SAP certified and move toward an SAP Functional Consultant role in Finance.

As a beginner, I find the SAP learning environment very broad, and sometimes I feel confused about where to start and which courses to complete before attempting the main certification.

My target certification is:
SAP Certified – Implementation Consultant – SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition – Financial Accounting.

I would sincerely appreciate your guidance on a step-by-step learning path starting from foundational courses up to the certification level.

Specifically, I would like to know:

  1. Which beginner or prerequisite courses you recommend before starting the main certification learning journey

  2. Whether there are specific foundational SAP Finance or system navigation courses suitable for someone with Accounts Payable experience

  3. Any recommended practice systems or preparation resources to build confidence before taking the certification exam

My objective is to start from the basics, build strong knowledge gradually, and prepare properly for certification.

Thank you very much for your support and guidance.

Kind regards,
Syeda Munazza Bukhari

entry.title: how to store/reuse all bids & enable backup suppliers
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

 

I’m an SAP MM/Sourcing implementor in a fast-moving F&B company using S/4HANA Public Cloud + Ariba (4BL APIs), looking for guidance on bid price reuse.

 

Scenario:

We capture all supplier bids (winners & losers) and want to:

 

  • Reuse valid winning prices
  • Quickly switch to backup suppliers if the main vendor has no stock

 

 

Challenge:

Standard SAP focuses on awarded suppliers, but we need structured access to non-awarded bids without manual tracking.

 

Question:

How do you design to:

  • Store/reuse all bid prices
  • Enable fast supplier switching in PO
  • Track price validity with audit trail

Any best practices are appreciated

Thanks!

entry.title: SAP Public cloud - Cannot remove configuration - customized customer condition group
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I created customer condition group= 10 to 20.

After creation in dev, there is no deletion button.

Could you advise where I can remove them? as there is limitation on running number and I need to rearrange it

 

.

entry.title: Unable to Modify Email Template – Workflow Notification Issue
entry.content:
Hello, 

We are currently facing an issue related to workflow email notifications in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

We identified that the email template used for Purchase Order approval notifications contains a hardcoded URL pointing to the Test tenant instead of the Production tenant.

We are unable to implement the correction due to system restrictions:

  • The template cannot be edited in the Production system
  • The template is not available for selection in the "Export Software Collection" app
  • Copying or creating a new template in Production is also restricted

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Sales Tax Calculation for Free Item and Tax amount to be borne by seller
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

We have requirement from India based client related to Free Goods. 

They run free schemes like 10+1 Free. GST tax to be paid for the Free item as per Government rule. As per Client requirement, tax will be paid by the seller and not to be charged to the customer for Free item.  They are using S4 HANA PUC. Using CBXN item category for free goods.

Example: Saleable Goods Price - 100, Qty - 10, Order Amount - 1000, Tax - 50

Free Goods Sale Price - 100, Qty -1, Sales Value - 100, Tax - 5. Discount for Customer - 105. 

We tried to achieve by applying standard 100% discount condition before calculation of tax at item level. This will make the tax rate 0 which is not legally acceptable.

We tried to achieve by applying standard 100% discount condition after calculation of tax at item level. But this is driving the Order Item Net value (negative) -5 with Tax amount as 5. This cannot be submitted to GST.

If the discount applied at order header level (with additional Routines), then it will be distributed to all line items as per standard which is not acceptable by the client.

Please suggest.

Regards,

Krishna
